tools.name: edit_contact
tools.description: Edit an existing contact in the address book

contact_id.description: The ID of the contact to edit

blockchain_address_or_account_name.description: Updated blockchain address or blockchain account name for the contact

blockchain_network.description: Updated blockchain network corresponding to the address or account name

tools.name: list_contacts
tools.description: List all contacts in the address book

tools.name: delete_contact
tools.description: Delete a contact from the address book

contact_id.description: The ID of the contact to delete
